title: MoveUI Forged
description: This is a Forge 1.20.1 port of Move-UI.
body:
# What is This
This is a `Forge 1.20.1` port of [Move-UI](https://modrinth.com/mod/move-ui).

# Original Module Introduction
Ello! This is a simple mod made for mod packs to move the ui elements like your hotbar or health around the screen. Move-UI will generate a config file that will let you add an amount of distortion for each element on the screen in the x and y axis'.

# Attention
Changed from the original json configuration file to use toml configuration.

# Other difference
Added a class that proxies the default configuration, allowing configuration to be dynamically changed in client-side scripts via KubeJS~~~~
